caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, is discussing a complex diagram that illustrates various interconnected concepts related to trial and learning processes. The central image features a 3D question mark, symbolizing inquiry and problem-solving. Surrounding this are multiple circular nodes with labels such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight dish," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are connected by arrows, indicating relationships and flow between different aspects of the system being discussed. The overall theme seems to revolve around understanding and addressing societal issues through systematic approaches and collaborative efforts.
